title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners Overview
text: The 83rd Golden Globes ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser on January 11, 2026, celebrated acclaimed films and television programs. The event took place at The Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California. Paul Thomas Anderson's One Battle After Another dominated the motion picture categories, securing four awards including Best Picture Musical or Comedy and Best Director. Hamnet won Best Picture Drama, while Sinners claimed Best Cinematic and Box Office Achievement. In television, The limited series Adolescence earned four awards, while The Studio won Best Musical or Comedy Series. Timothée Chalamet won Best Actor in a Motion Picture Musical/Comedy. Teyana Taylor received Best Supporting Actress in a Motion Picture and delivered an emotional acceptance speech. Stellan Skarsgård claimed Best Supporting Actor in a Motion Picture, while Rhea Seehorn won Best Female Actor in Television Drama and Jean Smart earned Best Female Actor in Television Musical/Comedy. Helen Mirren received the Cecil B. DeMille Award, and Sarah Jessica Parker was honored with the Carol Burnett Award. Seth Rogen won Best Male Actor in Television Musical/Comedy, and Ricky Gervais took home Best Stand-Up Comedy Performance.
